channel.title: GitHub Smalltalk Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Smalltalk in GitHub

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-boxer
item.description: A set of utilities to work with Rust through FFI

item.title: feenkcom/JavaScriptGenerator
item.description: A toolkit to generate JavaScript source code from Pharo.

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-clipboard
item.description: Glamorous Toolkit bindings to Clipboard

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-world
item.description: Various parts of the world in GT

item.title: svenvc/ztimestamp
item.description: I am ZTimestamp, a Magnitude, a point in time, an alternative to DateAndTime and TimeStamp

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-chrome
item.description: Gtoolkit specific functionality for Chrome Dev Tools access

item.title: feenkcom/gt4xmlsupport
item.description: Glamorous Toolkit for XMLSupport

item.title: feenkcom/gt4dockerengine
item.description: Glamorous Toolkit extensions for Docker Engine

item.title: feenkcom/gt4jenkins
item.description: An elegant Jenkins client for Glamorous Toolkit.

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-demos
item.description: A collection of ready to run demos of Glamorous Toolkit.

item.title: feenkcom/gt4gemstone
item.description: A Gtoolkit interface to GemStone

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-examples
item.description: The engine for example-driven development in Pharo.

item.title: svenvc/NeoJSON
item.description: NeoJSON is an elegant and efficient standalone Smalltalk framework to read and write JSON converting to or from Smalltalk objects.

item.title: feenkcom/PharoLink
item.description: A PythonBridge / JSLink style server for Pharo

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-remote-python
item.description: Gtoolkit specific functionality for Python integration

item.title: feenkcom/gt4git
item.description: The interface to work with Git projects from within Glamorous Toolkit.

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-external-process
item.description: A Pharo library for cross-platform running of external commands and getting their output.

item.title: feenkcom/gt4lsp
item.description: The connection to the Language Server Protocol for Glamorous Toolkit

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-phlow
item.description: The GT engine for scripting reactive browsers

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-vm-bindings
item.description: Image side code to communicate with the Glamorous Toolkit VM

item.title: feenkcom/gt4magritte
item.description: Magritte implementation for Glamorous Toolkit

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-presenter
item.description: The tool for live slide-based storytelling.

item.title: feenkcom/gtoolkit-filebrowser
item.description: A glamorous file browser
